exam_format: Linear computer-based with case study sections (Prometric CBT)

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Prometric test centers. All 6 ARE 5.0 divisions available year-round.

id_requirements: One valid, unexpired government-issued photo ID. Name must match NCARB account exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No personal reference materials permitted. Open-book NOT permitted. Candidates must complete all 6 divisions within a 5-year rolling window. 60-day waiting period required between retakes of the same division.
renewal_options: ARE 5.0 divisions passed are valid indefinitely once the full 6-division credential is earned. Individual passed divisions within the 5-year rolling window do not expire.

prerequisites.description: NCARB AXP (Architectural Experience Program) completion recommended; state board eligibility required

retake_policy.notes: 60-day waiting period between retakes of the same division. Unlimited retakes permitted. All 6 divisions must be passed within a 5-year rolling window. Full exam fee required for each retake.

official_study_resources.title: ARE 5.0 Guidelines
official_study_resources.notes: Free official guidelines and exam guides for all 6 ARE 5.0 divisions

official_study_resources.title: NCARB Practice Exams
official_study_resources.notes: Official practice materials and case study examples available through NCARB
